attributes.title: k3s (dev) guide
attributes.visState:
{"title":"k3s (dev) guide","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## k3s (dev) — LAN cluster health

**Dev-only.** Built for the Multipass/`shared-gitops-k8s-cluster` k3s LAN (`v1.36.2+k3s1`), not for GCP/cloud.

### Nodes (expected)
| Node | Role | LAN IP |
|---|---|---|
| `k8s-cp-1` | control-plane + etcd | `10.177.76.137` |
| `k8s-worker-1` | worker | `10.177.76.175` |
| `k8s-worker-2` | worker | `10.177.76.141` |
| `k8s-worker-3` | worker | `10.177.76.44` |

### What feeds this board
- **node-exporter** DaemonSet (`observability`, hostNetwork `:9100`)
- **kube-state-metrics** (`observability:8080`, allowlisted series)
- OTel `prometheus/k3s` → Data Prepper → `otel-v1-apm-metrics*`
- Filter: `metric.attributes.platform_component: k3s`

KPI tiles use **distinct series** / **latest-per-series sum** — not `sum` of every scrape sample in the time picker (that looked like 140 "nodes Ready"). Phase / Running counts require `value:1` — kube-state emits every phase with 0/1, so cardinality without that filter counts every pod in every phase.

### Companion boards
- [**Logs**](/app/dashboards#/view/logs-explore) — app signal / HTTP
- [**DataPersistence**](/app/dashboards#/view/data-persistence) — Postgres + Redis

Stale nav entries under *Recently viewed* (Loadlinker / Platform war room / …) are browser history only — those dashboards were deleted. Clear via the nav overflow or a fresh profile.

Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster."},"aggs":[]}

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"name.keyword: \"kube_node_status_condition\" AND metric.attributes.condition.keyword: Ready AND metric.attributes.status.keyword: \"true\" AND metric.attributes.platform_component: k3s","language":"lucene"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

{"query":{"query":"name.keyword: \"kube_pod_status_phase\" AND metric.attributes.phase.keyword: Running AND value: 1 AND metric.attributes.platform_component: k3s","language":"lucene"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: Deployment replicas unavailable
attributes.visState: {"title":"Deployment replicas unavailable","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json\",\"padding\":8,\"autosize\":{\"type\":\"fit\",\"contains\":\"padding\"},\"data\":[{\"name\":\"series\",\"url\":{\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-metrics*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"query\":{\"bool\":{\"filter\":[{\"range\":{\"time\":{\"%timefilter%\":true}}},{\"term\":{\"name.keyword\":\"kube_deployment_status_replicas_unavailable\"}},{\"term\":{\"metric.attributes.platform_component.keyword\":\"k3s\"}}]}},\"aggs\":{\"series\":{\"terms\":{\"field\":\"metric.attributes.deployment.keyword\",\"size\":200},\"aggs\":{\"latest\":{\"top_metrics\":{\"metrics\":{\"field\":\"value\"},\"sort\":{\"time\":\"desc\"},\"size\":1}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.series.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"latest\",\"expr\":\"datum.latest && datum.latest.top && datum.latest.top[0] && datum.latest.top[0].metrics && datum.latest.top[0].metrics['value'] != null ? datum.latest.top[0].metrics['value'] : 0\"},{\"type\":\"aggregate\",\"ops\":[\"sum\"],\"fields\":[\"latest\"],\"as\":[\"total\"]}]}],\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"series\"},\"encode\":{\"enter\":{\"align\":{\"value\":\"center\"},\"baseline\":{\"value\":\"middle\"},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#111\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":40},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"text\":{\"signal\":\"format(datum.total, ',.0f') + ' unavailable replicas'\"}},\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width / 2\"},\"y\":{\"signal\":\"height / 2\"}}}}]}","hideWarnings":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.visState: {"title":"MemAvailable MiB by node","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json\",\"padding\":{\"left\":8,\"right\":8,\"top\":8,\"bottom\":8},\"autosize\":{\"type\":\"fit\",\"contains\":\"padding\"},\"data\":[{\"name\":\"raw\",\"url\":{\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-metrics*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"query\":{\"bool\":{\"filter\":[{\"range\":{\"time\":{\"%timefilter%\":true}}},{\"term\":{\"name.keyword\":\"node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes\"}},{\"term\":{\"metric.attributes.platform_component.keyword\":\"k3s\"}}]}},\"aggs\":{\"timeline\":{\"date_histogram\":{\"field\":\"time\",\"fixed_interval\":\"1m\",\"min_doc_count\":1},\"aggs\":{\"series\":{\"terms\":{\"field\":\"metric.attributes.node.keyword\",\"size\":8},\"aggs\":{\"avg_value\":{\"avg\":{\"field\":\"value\"}}}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.timeline.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"flatten\",\"fields\":[\"series.buckets\"],\"as\":[\"bucket\"]},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"node\",\"expr\":\"datum.bucket.key\"},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"raw_value\",\"expr\":\"datum.bucket.avg_value.value\"},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"value\",\"expr\":\"datum.raw_value / 1048576\"},{\"type\":\"filter\",\"expr\":\"isValid(datum.value) && isFinite(datum.value)\"}]}],\"scales\":[{\"name\":\"x\",\"type\":\"time\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"raw\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"range\":\"width\"},{\"name\":\"y\",\"type\":\"linear\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"raw\",\"field\":\"value\"},\"nice\":true,\"zero\":false,\"range\":\"height\"},{\"name\":\"color\",\"type\":\"ordinal\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"raw\",\"field\":\"node\"},\"range\":{\"scheme\":\"category10\"}}],\"axes\":[{\"orient\":\"bottom\",\"scale\":\"x\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"title\":\"time\",\"titleFontSize\":11},{\"orient\":\"left\",\"scale\":\"y\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"title\":\"MiB\",\"titleFontSize\":11,\"format\":\",.1f\"}],\"legends\":[{\"fill\":\"color\",\"title\":\"node\",\"orient\":\"right\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"titleFontSize\":11}],\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"group\",\"from\":{\"facet\":{\"name\":\"series\",\"data\":\"raw\",\"groupby\":\"node\"}},\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"line\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"series\"},\"encode\":{\"enter\":{\"interpolate\":{\"value\":\"linear\"},\"strokeWidth\":{\"value\":2}},\"update\":{\"x\":{\"scale\":\"x\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"value\"},\"stroke\":{\"scale\":\"color\",\"field\":\"node\"},\"tooltip\":{\"signal\":\"{title: datum.node, 'MiB': format(datum.value, ',.1f'), time: utcFormat(datum.key, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}\"}}}}]}]}","hideWarnings":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: k3s (dev)
attributes.description: LAN k3s cluster health (Multipass shared-gitops): node load / memory / root disk, Ready nodes, pod phases, restart leaders, unavailable Deployments/DaemonSets. Dev-only — not for GCP. Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster
